Prescription Drug Cost Calculator

Estimate your medication costs and find lower-cost generics.

Type a brand or generic name and pick from the list.

Units per month (e.g. 30 for once-daily pills).

Optional — adjusts the estimate.

Search for a medication above to see your estimated cost.

Estimates only. These are rough cash-price estimates for education — not your plan's price. Actual costs vary by pharmacy, location, dosage, coupons, and your Medicare drug plan. For exact pricing, check the Medicare Plan Finder, ask your pharmacist, or talk to a licensed agent.

Paying too much for prescriptions?

Send us your medication list — we'll check whether a different plan saves you money. Free, no pressure.
